notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee singles on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Agustín Ramírez scores. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Throwing error by left fielder Cody Bellinger.

notableEvents.label: Griffin Conine pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Griffin Conine grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Leo Jiménez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks singles on a line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge.

notableEvents.label: Griffin Conine pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Griffin Conine flies out sharply to center fielder Trent Grisham. Javier Sanoja to 3rd.
